scripts.author: ruydt
scripts.title: Block dangerous commands
scripts.purpose: Deny dangerous shell commands (rm -rf ~, curl | sh, force-push to main, mkfs) with a reason the agent can act on.

scripts.author: ruydt
scripts.title: Cost warning
scripts.purpose: Warn when token usage in the rolling 5h window crosses a threshold. Silent otherwise.

scripts.author: ruydt
scripts.title: Format & lint on edit
scripts.purpose: Auto-format the edited file (prettier/ruff/gofmt, single-file) and feed lint errors back so the agent fixes them.

scripts.author: ruydt
scripts.title: Git autostage
scripts.purpose: Opt-in checkpoint per agent turn: git add -u (tracked files only), optional local commit, never pushes.

scripts.author: ruydt
scripts.title: Inject context
scripts.purpose: Inject just-in-time context per prompt: git branch + working-tree state, plus .argus-context.md or ~/.argus/context.md if present.

scripts.author: ruydt
scripts.title: Notify webhook
scripts.purpose: Slack / Discord / ntfy / Telegram / custom webhook when the agent finishes or needs attention. Rate-limited; silent without config.

scripts.author: ruydt
scripts.title: Permission request dialog
scripts.purpose: Native macOS approval dialog with an Always list.

scripts.author: ruydt
scripts.title: Protect branches
scripts.purpose: Deny git commit/push/branch-deletion on protected branches (main, master); suggests a feature branch.

scripts.author: ruydt
scripts.title: Protect secret files
scripts.purpose: Deny access to secret files (.env, *.pem, ~/.ssh/, ~/.aws/). .env.example/sample/template and secrets.test/spec.* are allowed.

scripts.author: ruydt
scripts.title: Prompt-injection scanner
scripts.purpose: Warn-only prompt-injection scanner on tool output. Injects a caution into context instead of blocking.

scripts.author: ruydt
scripts.title: Stop notification
scripts.purpose: Local notification when the agent finishes.
